title: Have Archaeologists MISSED an Important Chapter of Human History?
summary: This interview discusses the possibility that archaeologists may have overlooked an important chapter of human history. The guest argues that much of the planet remains archaeologically unsurveyed and criticizes the academic community's dismissive attitude toward alternative theories about the origins of civilization.

key_claims.claim: Much of our planet has not been subjected to detailed intensive archaeological survey
It is extremely premature for archaeologists to be so confident in their model of the origins of civilization
There should be willingness to consider the possibility that we have missed an important chapter of the human story
